Trouvez rapidement des réponses aux ques: Quickly find answers to the most frequently asked questions and contact us to ask your questions for free.
Combien coûte la construction d’une mais: How much does it cost to build a house in Togo?
Le coût dépend du standing et de la surf: The cost depends on the standard and the surface area. As an indication, our prices start at 330,000 FCFA/m² for standard housing and can reach 1,200,000 FCFA/m² for Prestige. Request a free personalized quote for an accurate estimate.
Une villa standard de 150 m² prend génér: A standard 150 m² villa generally takes 8 to 12 months, depending on the standard and finishes. Exact timeframes are defined together and included in the contract.
Je vive à l’étranger, comment suivre mon: I live abroad, how do I track my project?
Nous proposons un suivi à distance avec: We offer remote monitoring with regular photo/video reports and videoconferences according to your availability. A dedicated project manager is your single point of contact.
Oui. Le paiement se fait par étapes, au: Yes. Payment is made in installments, as work progresses. The schedule is defined together before the start of the site.
Oui. Nous intervenons sur tout le territ: Yes. We operate throughout the Togolese territory: Greater Lomé, Maritime, Plateaux, Centrale, Kara and Savanes regions. A geographical coefficient is applied depending on the area.
Garantie décennale sur la structure, gar: 10-year structural warranty, perfect completion warranty (1 year), professional liability insurance. All our commitments are contractualized.
Puis-je voir des exemples de vos réalisa: Can I see examples of your previous work?
Par respect pour la confidentialité de n: Out of respect for our clients' confidentiality, we do not publish photos of our sites. We can, however, provide you with verifiable references upon request during a meeting.
Comment AIAE se compare-t-elle aux grand: How does AIAE compare to large foreign companies?
Nous offrons une expertise technique de: We offer international-level technical expertise with local roots. This means: responsiveness, in-depth knowledge of the Togolese terrain, and fair prices without the extra costs associated with expatriate teams. Our founder was trained to European standards while perfectly mastering local realities.
Prêt À Concrétiser Votre Projet ?: Ready to bring your project to life?

Are you an individual wishing to build your residence? A company

AIAE est née d’une observation simple ::
AIAE was born from a simple observation: in West Africa, a client who
wishes to build must coordinate a multitude of stakeholders themselves
architect, design office, mason, electrician, plumber with no guarantee of
consistency or respect for commitments.
Fort de <strong>plus de 18 années d’expé:
Drawing on over 18 years of experience in civil engineering, a background as a
teacher-researcher, and solid training in business administration,
the founder of AIAE decided to offer a different model:
a company that masters the entire chain, from design to
realization.
<strong>Basée à Lomé</strong>, AIAE SARL:
Based in Lomé, AIAE SARL has a clear ambition: to become the reference in
West Africa for integrated solutions in construction, energy,
security, and prefabrication.
Notre savoir-faire en <strong class=\"te: Our expertise in civil engineering is rooted in over 15 years of field practice: design, sizing, realization, and supervision of complex structures.
Construction, énergie, sécurité, préfabr: Construction, energy, security, prefabrication four complementary divisions under a single brand, unparalleled in West Africa.
Bordereaux des Prix Unitaires <strong cl: Unit Price Schedules (UPS), 4 standardized levels of standing, detailed quotes line by line. Every franc is justified.
Délais, coûts et qualité inscrits au con: Deadlines, costs, and quality written into the contract. Late penalties. 10-year warranty. Contract signable before a notary.

« To offer every individual, corporate, or institutional client a single partner
capable of designing, building, equipping with energy, and securing their infrastructure,
with commitments kept and full transparency. »

CONSTRUIRE AU TOGO DEPUIS L'ÉTRANGER : <: BUILDING IN TOGO FROM ABROAD: HERE ARE OUR ANSWERS
Mon argent sera-t-il bien utilisé ?: Will my money be well spent?
Chaque franc est tracé. Vous recevez un: Every franc is tracked. You receive a line-by-line quote based on our Unit Price Schedule (BPU). Payment is made in stages, only upon validation of progress through photos and videos. No full payment is requested before startup.
Comment suivre mon chantier à 10 000 km: How to follow my construction site from 10,000 km away?
Rapports photos et vidéos hebdomadaires: Weekly photo and video reports sent via WhatsApp or email. Bi-monthly follow-up video conferences adapted to your time zone (evenings and weekends available). A dedicated project manager, reachable by phone and WhatsApp.
Comment payer en toute sécurité depuis l: How to pay securely from abroad?
Virement international vers un compte ba: International transfer to a verified Togolese bank account in the name of the company AIAE SARL. Clear payment schedule defined in the contract. No cash payments requested. Receipt issued for each payment.
Et les démarches administratives au Togo: What about administrative procedures in Togo?
Nous gérons tout pour vous : permis de c: We handle everything for you: building permits, utility connections (water, electricity, telecom), land formalities if necessary. You have nothing to manage on-site.
Quelle garantie ai-je que le travail ser: What guarantee do I have that the work will be well done?
Garantie décennale contractuelle sur la: 10-year contractual structural warranty. 1-year perfect completion guarantee. Detailed contract with technical specifications, signable before a notary in Togo for maximum legal security. Verifiable references provided upon request during an appointment.
Je n’ai pas encore de terrain, pouvez-vo: I don't have land yet, can you help me?
Nous pouvons vous conseiller sur le choi: We can advise you on the choice of land based on your project (area, soil type, accessibility). We are not real estate agents, but our technical expertise will help you avoid unpleasant surprises.
De votre <strong class=\"font-heavy text: From your first call to the handover of keys
<strong class=\"font-heavy\">Échange en: Video conference exchange adapted to your time zone. We listen to your project, your needs, your budget. Free and without obligation. Duration: 30 to 45 minutes.
Nous réalisons les études préliminaires: We carry out preliminary studies: technical feasibility, architectural sketch, detailed estimate based on the BPU with breakdown by item. Everything is sent by email for your validation. Lead time: 2 to 4 weeks.
Contrat détaillé envoyé par email. <stro: Detailed contract sent by email. Two signature options: remote electronic signature or signature before a notary in Togo for maximum legal security (a proxy can sign on your behalf if you cannot travel). Clear payment schedule, linked to verifiable progress milestones (foundations completed, slab poured, roof installed, etc.). First payment for project startup.
Pendant toute la durée du chantier : <st: Throughout the duration of the project: weekly photo and video reports, bi-monthly follow-up video conferences, immediate alerts in case of decisions to be made. Your project manager is reachable by phone and WhatsApp.
<strong class=\"font-heavy\">Procès-verb: Handover report established during your visit to Togo or via detailed video conference. Observations noted and corrected. Delivery of keys and complete technical documentation (execution plans, reports, warranties).
<strong class=\"font-heavy\">Garantie de: 1-year perfect completion guarantee: any defect found is repaired free of charge. 10-year structural warranty. Your AIAE contact remains available after delivery.
Puis-je lancer un projet sans être physi: Can I start a project without being physically in Togo?
Oui, absolument. Tout le processus est c: Yes, absolutely. The entire process is designed to be managed remotely: studies, contract, payments, monitoring. Your presence is only desirable for the final handover, and even this step can be done via video.
Dans quels pays avez-vous des clients de: In which countries do you have diaspora clients?
Nous accompagnons des clients résidant e: We support clients living in France, Canada, the USA, Germany, Belgium, Switzerland, the UK, and other countries. Our organization is adapted to all time zones.
Quel est le budget minimum pour un proje: What is the minimum budget for a project?
Pour une villa Standard de 100 m² en zon: For a Standard 100 m² villa in the Greater Lomé area, expect to pay from 33 million FCFA (approximately €50,000) for construction alone. This amount varies according to the standard, surface area, and location. Use our online simulator for a personalized estimate.
De 8 à 18 mois selon la surface et le st: From 8 to 18 months depending on the surface area and the standard. A Standard 150 m² villa takes about 8-12 months. Deadlines are contractual.
Puis-je combiner construction et énergie: Can I combine construction and solar energy?
Oui, c’est même l’un de nos atouts majeu: Yes, it is even one of our major assets. Our Energy Division (launching 2026) allows for the integration of a solar installation right from the design stage of your building. One point of contact, one contract, one energy-autonomous home.
Avez-vous un représentant en France / Eu: Do you have a representative in France / Europe?
Nous n’avons pas de bureau physique en E: We do not have a physical office in Europe, but in-person meetings can be organized occasionally during our team's travels to Europe. Outside of these periods, video conferencing remains our primary mode of communication.
